title: Opening for Category Manager at Reliance Digital Ventures Solutions

jsonLd.title: Opening for Category Manager at Reliance Digital Ventures Solutions
jsonLd.description:
Reliance Digital Ventures Solutions, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Category Manager for our Mysuru operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Reliance Digital Ventures Solutions:
Reliance Digital Ventures Solutions is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Develop and implement category growth strategies
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in Content Writing
• Proficiency in Magento
• Proficiency in WooCommerce
• Proficiency in SEO/SEM
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Retention Marketing

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Learning & development budget
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Mysuru, Karnataka, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Reliance Digital Ventures Solutions!
